meaning: n.苏格兰的冰上掷石游戏,头发的卷曲,卷缩
examples: Smoke was curling up the chimney.
The corners of the rug were curling up.
Then he adds a few quick curls with his curling iron.
Perez doubled the lead in the 55th minute with a superb curling 25-meter shot.
Mukendi's curling effort near the end gave Coleraine a point - but they needed all three.
